docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-07-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, EVELYN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY MANAY, SOFIA AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, EVELYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S SON RENZO MANAY INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANAY, SOFIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERRERA, EVELYN THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WAS AN AGENT OF MR. CALDERON, THE LAW OFFICES OF KRAMER AND KASLOW, OR OTHER INVOLED PARTIES. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THE PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST OTHER PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
